# PrivatePaycheck

> Free paycheck and income tax calculator for US workers 2026. State-by-state calculators for all 50 states. Covers overtime tax, tips tax, No Tax on Tips deduction.

## Key pages

- / : Federal paycheck calculator 2026
- /california-paycheck-calculator : California paycheck calculator 2026
- /texas-paycheck-calculator : Texas paycheck calculator 2026
- /new-york-paycheck-calculator : New York paycheck calculator 2026
- /florida-paycheck-calculator : Florida paycheck calculator 2026
- /illinois-paycheck-calculator : Illinois paycheck calculator 2026
- /ohio-paycheck-calculator : Ohio paycheck calculator 2026
- /georgia-paycheck-calculator : Georgia paycheck calculator 2026
- /north-carolina-paycheck-calculator : North Carolina paycheck calculator 2026
- /michigan-paycheck-calculator : Michigan paycheck calculator 2026
- /overtime-tax-calculator-2026 : Overtime tax calculator — $12,500 deduction 2026
- /tips-tax-calculator-2026 : No Tax on Tips calculator — $25,000 cap 2026
- /no-tax-on-tips-calculator : No Tax on Tips annual savings calculator
